competitor_launches.description: Every product launch, feature announcement, or major release by a company or project mentioned in this document

project_name.description: Name of the project or company making the launch

launch_date.description: Date or timeframe of the launch if stated, else empty

summary.description: 1-2 sentence summary of the launch and its significance

relevance.description: high, medium, or low relevance to the cloud-native / service mesh / platform engineering space

source_context.description: Where in the document this appears: session title, section heading, slide title
